iterations.strategy: TIMEOUT: Query Optimizer failed for Q1: Agent "Query Optimizer" timed out after 30m 0s

Root cause (correctness): the original line.bin stores int8_t, which truncates line values >= 128 via C signed overflow — (int8_t)300 = 44, (int8_t)256 = 0. The code read line as uint8_t, giving 40.88 for SI,H instead of the correct 48.27. A new int16_t column version was built from pre.csv preserving full values (range 1-482). Category E fix: mmap line_int16.bin, read as int16_t, treat 0 as null. Performance root cause (Category B): the iter_0 code allocates 64 per-thread ThreadState objects each containing bitset<86135>[64] ≈ 685KB, totaling ~44MB of page-faulted memory outside any timed phase, adding ~33ms overhead on top of a 9ms actual scan. Fix: replace per-thread bitsets with a single shared atomic uint64_t bitset (14 groups × 1347 words = 150KB); per-thread state shrinks to 336 bytes (always cache-resident). Expected result: correctness fixed; hot time should drop from 42ms to ~10-12ms by eliminating the large allocation overhead.
